Timely submission of appeals is crucial to avoid enforcement of violation consequences once the appeal period expires.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003eWe are dedicated to listening to feedback, adapting to changing needs, and continuously improving our platform to better serve the needs of our Creator Networks. For example, violations occurring in March but dealt with in April will be subject to the new rules.)\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eUpdates:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cul\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eCurrent Rule\u003c/strong\u003e: Additional violation consequences – each violation \u003cu\u003ededucts a fixed 10 health score points\u003c/u\u003e and a fixed amount of $1,500 (capped at 50% of monthly Creator Network task bonuses).\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eRevised Rule\u003c/strong\u003e: Additional violation consequences – each violation \u003cu\u003ededucts health points per the basic health score rules\u003c/u\u003e and a fixed amount of $1,500 (capped at 50% of monthly Creator Network task bonuses).\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e *Basic health score deduction rules: in each calendar year, 5 points will be deducted for both the first and the second violation, and 10 points will be deducted for every violation from the third violation onwards\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ul\u003e\u003cp\u003eShould you have any concerns or disagree with a reported violation, we strongly encourage you to file an appeal within the designated appeal period. Timely submission of appeals is crucial to avoid enforcement of violation consequences once the appeal period expires.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003eWe are dedicated to listening to feedback, adapting to changing needs, and continuously improving our platform to better serve the needs of our Creator Networks. If you have any questions about the new updates, please feel free to contact your TikTok POC, or refer to Backstage Help Center. Thanks!\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003eTikTok LIVE\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003eApril 202
